function.message: I’m blocked on this inbox item because one requested OCR file is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_13__eur_000020__bill__studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md` (not found). I did not make any edits so we can avoid partial completion. Please confirm whether this was a typo and whether I should process only the existing four files (or provide the missing file).
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflows and schema before task work, and stopped without mutating workspace when request could not be completed fully due to missing referenced file.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly lists 5 OCR targets, but one path is missing (`read` returned file not found; `find` returned no match; `list` of `50_finance/purchases` confirms absence). Per `process-next-inbox-item.md` and inbox lane rules, blocked/ambiguous requests must stop without mutation, and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md` says avoid partial edits when task is not doable.
